## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Validation

- [ ] Configured and built with CMake
- [ ] Ran the demo when runtime behavior changed
- [ ] Checked CRC or temporal behavior if raster math changed
- [ ] Updated docs, workflows, or todo if the architecture contract changed

## Risk Notes

- Descriptor layout changes:
- Constant-buffer layout changes:
- Synchronization or temporal-history changes:
